Input.placeholder: e.g. Update SD price for Q1 2026

MessageStrip.text: Changes made here are part of a change request and will not take effect until approved.
Cannot load current configuration data — entity 'SDPriceMain' may not be in service binding ZSD_SD_PRICE_CONF. Ask your ABAP admin to add view ZC_SD_PRICE_MAIN to the service definition.

t:Table.noData: No price lines — click 'Add Line' to add the first entry

Input.valueStateText: Max Discount must be 0 or greater
Min Order Value must be 0 or greater
